title: Add more colors to the labels column
excerpt: Hello everyone, we noticed that there is a limited number of colors to select from with the labels. I learned from a Monday.com admin that there are only 34 color and once you run out, you can no longer create additional…

posts.author: benediktj (John Benedikt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone, we noticed that there is a limited number of colors to select from with the labels. I learned from a Monday.com admin that there are only 34 color and once you run out, you can no longer create additional labels on the dropdown.

Is it possible if you can add more?

Please see the screenshot attached.

Capture1119×599 80.8 KB

Thanks in advance.

Best,
JB
